text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Finished! Overall, I'm still slow. But it feels as though I'm gradually getting faster.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well, Trainer? My time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, is that so? I have quite a ways to go,
apparently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright has been, by her own terms, fairly
diligent in her training. Her run times, though,
don't reflect this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is this plan a mistake? Maybe I should have her
set a number of milestone goal races instead of
shooting straight for G1.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, as if the universe wants to increase my
anxiety...

Hahaha! Briiiight! Looks like another perfect
victory for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... You're quite swift, Pearl...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm the fastest in the world! The fastest
of fastests!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You, on the other hand, need to start putting in
real effort! One could hardly call this a partner
run the way you're going. Get serious, girl!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid that's easier said than done...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Seeking the Pearl—a globetrotter and
self-dubbed "world treasure." She and Mejiro
Bright are in the same year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's boastful but has the speed to back herself
up. Mejiro Bright pales by comparison.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You and I are in the same year. We are in the
same generation of runners.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want to compete with me to hold the
world in your hands?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I suppose. I think I could do it someday.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: "Someday"?! You'll morph into a mermaid before someday happens!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even with Seeking the Pearl provoking her, Mejiro
Bright is unmoved. The glimmer seems to be gone
from her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One morning, I decide to head to the park.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Come, I want you to see
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Do you see it? The little bird under that tree?
choice_data_list: I see it. It's sitting quite still.
I see it. It's sitting quite still.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It sure is. Actually, it was injured a while ago.
That's why it's so silent and calm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's very well-behaved. I'm sure it was nervous all
this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's been holding back because of its injury... But
very soon, I'm just sure that it will...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Cheep, cheep, cheeeeep!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Whew. It's managed to recover beautifully. What
a relief!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
See, it took flight when the time was right. That
little bird understands too. So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've kept you waiting, and the end of the year is
approaching fast.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I have something else to show you. Follow me.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Whaaaa?! Unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... You're no longer hopeless all of a sudden! I thought I would beat you easy-peasy like usual...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But you closed in right behind me during the final
stretch. How did you do that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I was so close to victory this time. Perhaps I would have won if the course had been a bit longer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
With just another little push... With a bit more
practice together with Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can barely believe what I just saw. To think that
Mejiro Bright would nearly beat a leading runner
like Seeking the Pearl...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can only speculate how this suddenly became
possible. Unless...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're correct. But I feel I've recovered to a
point that I needn't worry myself further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I take Mejiro Bright to the infirmary to get
her legs examined, she shows me some faint
marks on her shins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The pain was quite constant, but nothing so
serious as to keep me off my feet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I thought I would just bear with it for the time.
choice_data_list: So that's why you were holding yourself back?
So that's why you were holding yourself back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It was to keep you from worrying. I decided
to wait until I had recovered before telling you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This is a common injury for racers in their junior
year. The Mejiro family doctor told me to wait it
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright always moves at her own pace, but
underneath the surface...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There were reasons which made it necessary.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry that I didn't notice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, Trainer. I am the one who should
apologize. It was quite dishonest of me to keep
this from you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We may be late to start, but from this point
forward, if I try hard enough, I may be able to run
in the Hopeful Stakes, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All this time, she's been resting her wings, healing
her injury. I feel hopeful again, like the clouds
have parted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day when Mejiro Bright takes off and soars
through the big blue sky is around the corner.
